title: coaching — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from tier-based entitlements. Every switch defaults to ON; ops flips OFF only for surgical operational reasons (migration, third-party outage, incident containment).

flags.description: Master toggle for CoachingProfile create + update routes. Off = POST / PATCH / DELETE return 503. Reads unaffected.
Off = /verify + /deactivate return 503. Emergency-only during verification-workflow migrations.
Off = POST /coach-assignments returns 503. Reads + end unaffected.
Off = NotifyCertificationExpiringJob + NotifyCertificationExpiredJob no-op. Use during mass-migration to prevent notification storm.
Off = NotifyCoachAvailabilityConflictJob no-op. Assignments still created; conflict-detection silent.
Off = PurgeExpiredSkillRatingsJob no-op. Data ages in place — legal-hold-friendly.
Off = customer-facing coach picker returns empty roster + falls back to aggregate-info-only. Used during coach-roster overhaul.
